changes: Tasks with active conversations now show a filled chat icon and message count badge right on the task row — no more guessing which tasks have ongoing discussions.
The project Chat button now highlights and shows a message count when there are messages in the project thread.
Expanding a task to edit it now shows a clean, modern inline editor with icon labels, smooth focus states, and a slide-in animation.
You can now invite people to collaborate on a project — the Invite button is colored to match your project so it's easy to spot.
Added an Export button to save a copy of your project data.
Added a new 'Assigned to me' filter so you can quickly find tasks assigned specifically to you.
Swipe left or right to jump between tabs on mobile.
Helpful on-screen tips appear to guide you around drag & drop and navigation — tap 'got it' to dismiss them.
Cleaned up the mobile toolbar so it stays compact and uncluttered on small screens.
Fixed an issue that occasionally prevented deleting older projects.
Invite links now redirect unauthenticated users to log in and return them to the acceptance page automatically.
Existing projects without an icon are automatically assigned a fun random emoji icon.
Icon search in Project Overview now shows results as you type with smart debouncing.
The arrow guide in Contacts is hidden when an active invite link is already visible on screen.
Introduced a new Chat-based AI Assistant to effortlessly generate, organize, and enhance your projects.
Added 'Effort' and 'Priority' fields to tasks to help you better manage your workload.
Global search now instantly finds specific tasks directly within your projects.
You can now customize your projects by adding custom cover images.
Added the ability to log in quickly and securely using your X (Twitter) account.
Complete visual overhaul of the dashboard, project tiles, and task details for a more professional look.
Added a 'What's New' section on the home page so you never miss an update.
Launched the Connections system! You can now invite contacts using easy-to-share links and collaborate seamlessly.
Dramatically improved app speed with instant, flicker-free tab switching and optimistic UI updates.
Added visual confirmations when deleting projects to prevent accidental removals.
Improved task navigation: you can now open and close a task's details simply by clicking its name.
